commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human handling remains because contributor-supplied real behavior proof is required and source review did not find a narrow code defect for automation to repair.; Cleared: The diff tightens server-side package publish authorization and does not add dependency, workflow, secret, or supply-chain surface. (sha=64bf59c98c4242185090f2dfaf28380649b301b9)
commands.review_summary:
The branch revalidates package publish actor, owner user, and owner publisher active state before inserting a package release, with regression tests plus changelog and security spec notes.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main validates publish authority before a long package parsing/scanning/hashing window, then `insertReleaseInternal` only checks that actor and owner documents exist before inserting the release.
commands.review_followup: Human handling remains because contributor-supplied real behavior proof is required and source review did not find a narrow code defect for automation to repair.

target.title: fix: revalidate package publish owners before insert
target.body:
## Summary

Revalidates package publish authority immediately before inserting a package release.

## What changed

- Final release insert rechecks actor state.
- Final release insert rechecks owner user state.
- Final release insert rechecks owner publisher active state.
- A publish that started while valid cannot complete if the actor/owner/publisher is banned, deleted, or deactivated before the final write.

## Public behavior

Package publish rejects the final insert when the actor, requested owner, or owner publisher becomes invalid during the publish window. It does not create a release row under stale authority.

## Behavior proof

Focused terminal proof from the final package publish insert window:

```text
$ vitest run convex/packages.public.test.ts --reporter verbose --testNamePattern "final package publish inserts"

✓ convex/packages.public.test.ts > packages public queries > rejects final package publish inserts when the actor was banned mid-publish
✓ convex/packages.public.test.ts > packages public queries > rejects final package publish inserts when the requested owner was banned mid-publish
✓ convex/packages.public.test.ts > packages public queries > rejects final package publish inserts when the owner publisher was deleted mid-publish

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  3 passed | 129 skipped (132)
```

Full focused suite also passed:

```text
$ bun run test convex/packages.public.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       132 passed (132)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       1988 passed (1988)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
